title: Applicability
doc_html:
§1603. Applicability

            The provisions of this Chapter apply only to water cooperatives that were eligible to receive financing from the U.S.D.A. prior to January 1, 2011.

            Acts 2016, No. 444, §1, eff. June 9, 2016.
doc_text:
§1603.  Applicability
The provisions of this Chapter apply only to water cooperatives that were eligible to
receive financing from the U.S.D.A. prior to January 1, 2011.
Acts 2016, No. 444, §1, eff. June 9, 2016.
